reviews.review_title: Some potential but really bad rn
reviews.review_description: The sword movement is really slow meaning you could move your arm really fast just for your sword to slice like 2 seconds later
is it good but nobody is really online

reviews.review_title: With new updates this will be amazing!!!
reviews.review_description:
There’s a lot of potential here, and I can already imagine how cool it’ll be with future updates. The atmosphere is getting there — just needs more sound effects and that intense crowd energy to really bring the arena to life.

If you’re into sword fighting and VR arena combat, give this one a try. I’m really enjoying it so far, and I’m excited to see how the devs keep improving it. Great work!
This game is horrible its hitboxes sucks the graphics sucks please do something about it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying and your feedback. Game is under development and soon you will send lot of improvement both in graphics and gameplay.

reviews.review_description: Glitchy, characters move around super slow besides fighting, full hand grappling for weapons you can drop/throw/change hands as fluid as a first person shooter game, weapons and shields that break would be a realistic touch, it would be cool if you had finishers like gladiator, the crowd could dictate kill or mercy

developer_response.body: Thanks for wonderful feedback. We are already working on most of these things and some were interesting suggestion like crowd dictate of kill or mercy. Please stay tune for our updates.

reviews.review_description:
Pretty good so far, I’m limited for space in my house so it would be great if you could make the gladiator move with the control sticks, as it works right now I need to wait for my opponent to move in to attack so I can hit him. I know it’s still in its early phase so I’m hoping there are updates with more options. Definitely has potential for 5 stars but when/if those concerns are fixed I’ll update my review to 5.

*Updated* love the new changes, the control stick movement made all the difference, upgraded my rating to 5, just one small bug I noticed, when the opponent backs up they go through the wall and you can’t hit them, you need to wait until they come back so you can attack them, still minor but I lost a lot of time waiting on it.
It has ira goof points .... but its glitchy and the opponent moves way  beyond the boundary line.... which could make it more dangerous for players.

developer_response.body: Hi, We understand your concern about the opponent moving beyond the boundary line, which can be frustrating and unfair. We are investigating this specific issue and will work on implementing a solution that keeps the opponent within the designated boundaries.
